name: EDM Club

interaction_intensity.label: High Pressure
interaction_intensity.description: The 'current' of the dance floor is strong; standing still can feel socially awkward in high-traffic zones.

social_expectations: Focus is primarily on the DJ; verbal conversation is minimal on the dance floor.
solo_tips: Ear protection is essential for maintaining solo comfort.

safety_factors.label: High Risk
safety_factors.description: High sensory intensity and crowd-crush potential during headliner sets.

physical_proximity: Constant incidental contact; very high density on the main floor.
recommendations: Locate the free water station immediately
